scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @hivepulse/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @hivepulse/shared && tsc -p backend/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p frontend/tsconfig.json --noEmit
